case_title: ALLAN SCHWARTZ VS. VONAGE AMERICA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE AND VERBALLY STIPULATES TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED BY MAIL RETAINED IN THE COURT FILE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VONAGE AMERICA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION $1,925.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED APR-21-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VONAGE AMERICA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VONAGE AMERICA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, FILED. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. APPEARANCE BY ATTORNEY IS SUBJECT TO LIMITS OF CCP 116.530. DEFENDANT WAS NOTIFIED AND INSTRUCTIONS SENT BY FAX FOLLOWED BY MAILING.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT VONAGE AMERICA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2009 - CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AT THE JUNE 18, 2009 DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
